title: > misses the boundary
problem: Decide whether someone aged 18 counts as an adult (18 or older) and store the yes/no answer.

trace.checkpoint_prompt: age is 18, and 18 counts as an adult. After `is_adult = age > 18` runs, what will is_adult be?

trace.note: is_adult = (18 > 18) = False. Two things to notice: the comparison produced a real bool you stored, and `>` excludes 18 itself — the boundary is wrong.
